title: SQLancer distinct aggregate with error on group by constant
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value Decimal(10, 2), group_id Int32);
SELECT MIN(DISTINCT value) FROM test_table WHERE group_id = 1 GROUP BY 1;
CREATE TABLE another_table (a String, b Int32);
INSERT INTO another_table (a, b) VALUES ('test', 1), ('example', NULL), (NULL, 2);
key_bug_features: DISTINCT aggregate with GROUP BY constant
